data.title: CZ retweeted a tweet suggesting a potential dip
data.description: CZ retweeted a tweet from weRate co-founder Quinten on X, which said: "During the COVID-19 crash, $1.2 billion was liquidated; when FTX crashed, the scale of liquidated funds reached $1.6 billion; today's liquidated funds are $19.31 billion. People always hope to have bought during the COVID-19 crash, and this is the current COVID-19 crash."

data.title: Wintermute founder responds to rumors of bankruptcy: Everything is normal, sorry to disappoint you
data.description: Wintermute founder and CEO Evgeny Gaevoy responded to the rumors of bankruptcy on X, saying: "I'm sorry to disappoint you, but everything is normal at Wintermute and business is running as usual."

data.title: Galaxy Digital Secures $460M to Build Massive AI Hub in Texas
data.description:
Galaxy Digital has raised $460 million from a major global asset manager to convert its former Texas bitcoin mine into a massive AI-focused data center.

The post Galaxy Digital Secures $460M to Build Massive AI Hub in Texas first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/10/11/galaxy-digital-secures-460-m-ai-hub/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=galaxy-digital-secures-460-m-ai-hub

data.title: Uniswap founder: The platform's trading volume today is nearly $9 billion with no stress or downtime
data.description: Uniswap founder Hayden Adams wrote on X, “The massive sell-off is a good reminder of how DeFi is different. Uniswap’s trading volume today is close to $9 billion, well above normal levels, and the platform has not experienced any pressure or downtime.”

data.title: A suspected Bitmine wallet has increased its holdings by 33,323 ETH, worth $126.4 million.
data.description: Two new wallets suspected to be owned by Bitmine withdrew 33,323 ETH worth $126.4 million from FalconX and Kraken.

data.title: Lighter: Platform services have been restored. We will release an incident analysis and initiate large-scale user compensation.
data.description: Lighter officially announced on X that platform services have now been restored. Close monitoring is underway to ensure stability. A post-mortem analysis of the outage will be released soon. Furthermore, substantial compensation will be provided to traders affected by today's issue.

data.title: A whale purchased over 14,000 ETH worth $55.5 million through over-the-counter transactions
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale purchased 14,165 ETH (worth $55.5 million) from FalconX, Coinbase, and Wintermute through over-the-counter transactions.

data.title: The $120,000 level becomes the battleground between Bitcoin bullish and bearish
data.description:
Bitcoin price falls below $119,000 as retail activity rises, whales open short and ETFs offset outflows. On-chain data points to cautious accumulation amid macroeconomic risk.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/bitcoin/the-120-000-level-becomes-the-battleground-between-bitcoin-bullish-and-bearish/

data.title: Aethir's Q3 revenue hits record $39.8 million, with ARR soaring to $166 million
data.description: Aethir's Q3 2025 report shows quarterly revenue exceeding $39.8 million, a 22% increase from the previous quarter. Average monthly revenue reached $13.29 million, and annualized recurring revenue (ARR) reached $166 million, a 13-fold increase from the same period last year, a record high for the company. Its revenue/market cap ratio reached 14.46% (industry average: 8–23%). Aethir delivered 340 million compute hours this quarter, a 17.5% increase from the previous quarter, bringing the cumulative delivery to over 1.2 billion hours. Aethir currently has 435,000 GPU containers deployed globally, covering 93 countries and regions, with an enterprise-grade standard SLA stability of 99.31%.

data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC has fallen below 111,000 USDT, currently trading at 110,989.1 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 8.52%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: The top Binance Futures user's 24-hour short position profit reached $3.881 million
data.description: According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an on-chain analyst, Dumbass1, the top 24-hour profitable account of Binance's real-time contract smart money, earned 3.881 million US dollars from short positions, including: SUI: 1.014 million US dollars, DOGE: 818,000 US dollars, XRP: 642,000 US dollars, SPX: 590,000 US dollars, LINK: 447,000 US dollars, HYPE: 818,000 US dollars. Most of them were opened in the evening of October 9, and the profits were stopped when the price plummeted at 5:30 this morning.

data.title: Binance Wallet: Users with 200 or more Binance Alpha Points can claim token airdrops at 4:00 PM
data.description: Binance Wallet officially announced on X that users can claim the Binance Alpha airdrop starting today at 4:00 PM (UTC+8). Users holding at least 200 Binance Alpha Points are eligible to claim the tokens. The airdrop will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully redeemed or the event ends. Further details will be announced later.

data.title: CZ responds to investigative reporter's false information about his nationality: Don't project stereotypes onto others
data.description: Regarding Trump's possible pardon of CZ, investigative journalist Laura Loomer criticized him on the X platform, claiming he was a Chinese citizen with UAE citizenship and expressing her "convince that someone was paid a lot of money to promote this." CZ responded on the X platform, stating, "I am not a Chinese citizen and haven't been for 30 years. I've also been a Canadian for 30 years. Like you, if I want to go to China, I need a visa. Furthermore, many top American entrepreneurs have obtained UAE citizenship. The UAE is one of the safest and most modern countries in the world. Please don't project your stereotypes onto others." CZ also added that an investigative journalist with 1.8 million followers couldn't correctly identify nationality information, which can be found as public information with a simple Google search. She may have other motives for making such remarks.

data.title: Base Protocol Leader: The cost of listing a token on an exchange should be 0

data.title: A whale bought 600.88 billion PEPE, worth $4.97 million
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale spent 4.97 million USDT to buy 600.88 billion PEPE just eight hours ago. The same wallet still holds 1 million USDC and may be purchasing more.

data.title: Zerobase founder: I did not exchange stablecoins for USDe or pledge USDe, and the relevant information is false
data.description: Zerobase founder Mirror Tang posted on X that the news that "Zerobase converted stablecoins into USDe and pledged them to obtain arbitrage opportunities" is false. ZeroBase did not convert stablecoins into USDe, nor did it pledge USDe.
